title: logos: a falsifiable, decontaminated inference framework for testing undeciphered-script decipherment claims
description: A discipline harness for telling a real decipherment of an undeciphered script from a fitted one: pre-registered predictions, multiple-testing deflation, contamination control (a literature index with an L_known/L_virgin partition, LLM-ablation, and an L_fake fabricated-corpus canary), and a held-out graduation gate computed mechanically. Linear A is the worked null — a body of rigorous, pre-registered negative results bounded by the corpus's information floor. The repository contains the source code and the original analysis/documentation; the underlying licensed Linear A corpus (GORILA / SigLA-derived) is gitignored and not redistributed.
